properties.groovyx-script-body:
import java.lang.StringBuilder
import java.sql.PreparedStatement
import java.sql.ResultSetMetaData
import org.postgresql.util.PGobject
import org.postgresql.util.PSQLException
import java.util.Map
import groovy.transform.Field
import groovy.sql.Sql
import groovy.json.JsonSlurper

@Field JsonSlurper parser = new JsonSlurper()

@Field Map config

@Field var flowFile

flowFile = session.get()

if (!flowFile) {
  return
}

config = parser.parseText(data_migration_config.value)

def processFilter(key, filter) {
  if (!filter.active) {
    return
  }

  var filtercond = []

  if (filter.schema.include) {
    filtercond.add("schema ~ '${filter.schema.include}'".toString())
  }

  if (filter.schema.exclude) {
    filtercond.add("schema !~ '${filter.schema.exclude}'".toString())
  }

  if (filter.root.include) {
    filtercond.add("root ~ '${filter.root.include}'".toString())
  }

  if (filter.root.exclude) {
    filtercond.add("root !~ '${filter.root.exclude}'".toString())
  }

  if (filtercond.isEmpty()) {
    filtercond.add("true")
  }

  SQL.source.eachRow(
    """
    with
    relations as (
      select
        pg_namespace.nspname as table_schema,
        parent.relname as parent,
        child.relname as child
      from pg_constraint
      join pg_attribute on
        pg_attribute.attrelid = pg_constraint.conrelid and
        pg_attribute.attnum = any(pg_constraint.conkey) and
        pg_constraint.contype = 'f' and
        pg_attribute.attname = 'parent_id' and
        pg_constraint.conrelid != pg_constraint.confrelid
      join pg_class as parent on
        parent.oid = pg_constraint.confrelid
      join pg_class as child on
        child.oid = pg_constraint.conrelid
      join pg_namespace on
        pg_namespace.oid = parent.relnamespace
    ),
    merged as (
      select
        tables.table_schema as schema,
        tables.table_name as root,
        tables.table_name as target
      from information_schema.tables
      left join relations on
        relations.table_schema = tables.table_schema and
        relations.child = tables.table_name
      where
        relations.child is null and
        tables.table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
      union all
      select
        table_schema as schema,
        parent as root,
        child as target
      from relations
    )
    select
      schema,
      root,
      jsonb_agg(target order by target) as targets
    from merged where
      ${filtercond.join(" and ")}
    group by schema, root
    """.toString()
  ) { row ->
    var schema = row.schema
    var root = row.root
    var targets = parser.parseText(row.targets.toString())

    var f = session.create(flowFile)
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.schema", schema)
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.root", root)
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.targets", row.targets.toString())
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.filter", key)
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.ref", "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000")
    f = session.putAttribute(f, "migration.kind", "loop")
    session.transfer(f, REL_SUCCESS)
  }
}


var entry

try {
  for (e in config.filters) {
    entry = e
    processFilter(e.key, e.value)
  }
  
  session.remove(flowFile)
} catch (e) {
  log.error("Script error when processing filter {}", entry.key, e)
  flowFile = session.penalize(flowFile)
  session.transfer(flowFile, REL_FAILURE)
}

parameters.name: data_migration_config
cleanup_configuration
